hero.heading: Everything You Need,
hero.subheading: From Web & App Development to AI, Cloud, and Digital Marketing — end-to-end solutions that power your business forward.

ctaBanner.heading: Not sure which service
ctaBanner.subheading: Book a free consultation call and our experts will help you choose the right solution for your business goals.

categories.heading: Build Your Digital
categories.subheading: Full-stack websites, mobile apps, and stunning UI/UX designs

cards.title: Web Development
cards.description: From static sites to complex web apps with admin panels, e-commerce, portfolios and custom solutions.

details.fullDescription: Comprehensive web development services covering the entire spectrum from simple informational websites to complex, scalable web applications. Our expert team builds responsive, SEO-optimized websites that engage users and drive conversions.
whatIncluded: Static websites (informational sites, portfolios, landing pages)
Admin panels and content management systems (CMS)
E-commerce platforms with shopping carts and checkout systems
Custom web applications (SaaS, project management tools, dashboards)
Progressive Web Apps (PWAs) for app-like experiences on mobile browsers
targetAudience: Startups and small businesses launching their first website
E-commerce retailers wanting to expand online
Service providers needing client booking systems
keyFeatures: Fast loading speeds (Core Web Vitals optimized)
deliverables: Fully functional website with source code

commonUseCases.name: Small business website with online booking
Real estate portal with property listings

cards.title: App Development
cards.description: Native Android & iOS apps, and cross-platform builds with React Native / Flutter.

details.fullDescription: End-to-end mobile application development covering native Android, native iOS, and cross-platform solutions. We build high-performance apps that deliver exceptional user experiences and meet your business objectives.
whatIncluded: Backend API development for mobile apps
targetAudience: Healthcare, fitness, education, and logistics companies
keyFeatures: Native performance and smooth user experience
deliverables: Fully functional app for App Store & Play Store

commonUseCases.name: Food delivery app with real-time updates

cards.title: UI/UX Design
cards.description: Pixel-perfect designs in Figma & Adobe XD — websites, apps and dashboard redesigns.

details.fullDescription: Professional UI/UX design services focused on creating intuitive, visually appealing digital experiences. We combine research, strategy, and creativity to design interfaces that users love.
targetAudience: Businesses wanting to improve user engagement

commonUseCases.name: E-commerce site redesign targeting 20%+ conversion increase
SaaS dashboard redesign for better UX

cards.title: E-commerce Solutions
cards.description: Complete online stores with payment gateways, cart systems, and product management.

details.fullDescription: Complete e-commerce solutions designed to help you launch and scale your online store. From store setup to payment integration to marketing automation, we handle everything needed for a successful online business.
whatIncluded: Complete online store setup and configuration
targetAudience: Brands selling products directly to consumers
Small businesses competing with large marketplaces
B2B companies selling to other businesses

cards.title: Custom Software
cards.description: School ERP, CRM, and Inventory systems — tailored to your exact business workflow.

details.fullDescription: Custom software development tailored to your specific business needs. From educational ERPs to CRM systems to inventory management, we build scalable, user-friendly solutions.
whatIncluded: School Management ERP (enrollment, attendance, grades, fees)

commonUseCases.name: CRM for sales team of 50+ people

categories.heading: Grow Faster,
categories.subheading: Digital marketing campaigns and ongoing website maintenance & support

cards.title: Digital Marketing
cards.description: SEO, Social Media, Google Ads and Content Marketing to grow your online audience.

details.fullDescription: Comprehensive digital marketing services designed to increase your online visibility, generate qualified leads, and grow your customer base. Our data-driven strategies deliver measurable results.

seo: On-page optimization (title tags, meta descriptions, headers)
Technical SEO (site speed, mobile optimization, structured data)
socialMedia: Paid social campaigns (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter)

targetAudience: E-commerce businesses wanting to increase sales
Local businesses competing in their market

breakdown.optimization: 2 months for data collection and optimization

cards.title: Maintenance & Support
cards.description: Keep your site fast and secure with ongoing bug fixes, updates and performance tuning.

details.fullDescription: Ongoing maintenance and support services to keep your website or application running smoothly, securely, and at peak performance 24/7/365.
targetAudience: E-commerce sites where downtime = lost sales
keyBenefits: Peace of mind knowing experts monitor your site

categories.heading: Intelligent Solutions,
categories.subheading: Chatbots, NLP, machine learning, computer vision and custom AI systems

cards.title: AI Chatbot Development
cards.description: Website, WhatsApp & Telegram bots that automate customer support and generate leads.

details.fullDescription: Advanced AI chatbot solutions that automate customer interactions, provide 24/7 support, and generate qualified leads. Our chatbots leverage natural language processing to understand and respond to customer queries intelligently.
targetAudience: E-commerce businesses handling high inquiry volume
Support teams wanting to reduce response time

cards.title: NLP Services
cards.description: Text analysis, sentiment detection, auto-reply systems and language translation.

details.fullDescription: Natural Language Processing services to extract meaningful insights from unstructured text data, automate responses, and break language barriers.
targetAudience: Large companies with high customer inquiry volume
deliverables: NLP model trained on your data

cards.title: Machine Learning
cards.description: Prediction systems, recommendation engines (like Amazon/Netflix), and fraud detection.

details.fullDescription: Machine learning solutions to predict outcomes, personalize recommendations, and detect anomalies that help your business grow and stay secure.
targetAudience: E-commerce companies increasing average order value
commonModels: Decision Trees and Random Forests for classification

cards.title: Computer Vision
cards.description: Image recognition, face detection, OCR and object detection solutions.

details.fullDescription: Computer vision solutions that enable machines to see and understand images and videos for automation, security, and insights.
targetAudience: Retail businesses automating checkout (Amazon Go style)

cards.title: Custom AI Solutions
cards.description: AI dashboards, automation tools, and AI integration into your existing systems.

details.fullDescription: Tailored AI solutions designed specifically for your unique business challenges and opportunities, integrating seamlessly with your existing systems.
targetAudience: Companies with proprietary data to leverage

categories.heading: Scale Without

cards.title: Cloud Hosting & Deployment
cards.description: Deploy websites and apps on AWS, Google Cloud or Azure with scalable infrastructure.

details.fullDescription: Enterprise-grade cloud hosting solutions that ensure high availability, scalability, and performance for your applications.
whatIncluded: CDN setup for fast content delivery

cards.title: DevOps & CI/CD
cards.description: Auto deployment pipelines with Git, Docker, Kubernetes and Jenkins.

details.fullDescription: DevOps and CI/CD implementation to automate your deployment pipeline, reduce errors, and enable rapid iterations.
whatIncluded: Git workflow setup and best practices
targetAudience: Tech companies with DevOps maturity goals

cards.title: Cloud Security
cards.description: Data encryption, backup systems, firewall setup and access control for your cloud.

details.fullDescription: Comprehensive cloud security measures to protect your data, comply with regulations, and prevent unauthorized access.

cards.title: Cloud Migration
cards.description: Move from local servers to the cloud — database migration and legacy system upgrades.

details.fullDescription: End-to-end cloud migration services to move your infrastructure, data, and applications to the cloud with minimal downtime.

cards.title: Cloud Storage & Monitoring
cards.description: Secure file storage, backup & recovery, auto-scaling and server performance monitoring.

details.fullDescription: Comprehensive cloud storage and monitoring solutions to keep your data safe, your systems running smoothly, and costs optimized.

cards.description: Connect Razorpay, Stripe, Twilio and build custom APIs for system-to-system integration.

typicalFindings: Severity levels: Critical, High, Medium, Low

cards.title: Data Analytics & BI
cards.description: Power BI & Tableau dashboards, real-time analytics and actionable business insights.

cards.description: Workflow, email and CRM automation with intelligent task scheduling.

cards.title: ERP & CRM Customization
cards.description: Business management software, customer tracking and sales pipeline systems.

cards.description: Help businesses adopt AI — strategy planning, model selection and implementation.

cards.description: Data backup systems, recovery planning and cloud restore setup so you never lose data.

cards.description: Website speed, database & server tuning — plus manual, automated & performance QA testing.

cards.title: IT Consulting & Digital Transformation
cards.description: Take your business offline → online with process digitization and a technology roadmap.

details.fullDescription: Strategic IT consulting and digital transformation services to modernize your business, improve efficiency, and accelerate growth.

engagementModels.name: Project-Based
engagementModels.description: Fixed scope and timeline with defined deliverables

engagementModels.name: Time & Materials
engagementModels.description: Flexible scope with hourly/daily rates and monthly invoicing

engagementModels.name: Retainer
engagementModels.description: Fixed monthly fee with defined hours/support level
